scripts.format: pnpm --filter web format && (cd apps/api && uv run ruff format .)
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && (cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .)
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && (cd apps/api && uv run mypy app)
scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test -- --run && (cd apps/api && uv run pytest)
